name: io.github.meloliva14/verity-mcp
description: Fail-closed verify-before-you-act gate for AI agents. Signed receipts. Pay-per-call via x402.

environmentVariables.name: VERITY_WALLET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OPTIONAL. Private key of a funded Base-mainnet wallet. Set it (with the verity-mcp[x402] extra) and this server settles its own disclosed x402 micro-payments, so the paid tools return real verdicts. Leave unset to run keyless: 402s are surfaced honestly and nothing is ever paid on your behalf. The key never leaves the process — it signs an EIP-3009 authorization locally and Verity only receives the signature. Use a dedicated, low-balance wallet.

environmentVariables.name: VERITY_PRICE_GROUNDED
environmentVariables.description: Disclosed per-call price for grounded_verify (Sonnet, web-grounded)

environmentVariables.name: VERITY_PRICE_PRO
environmentVariables.description: Disclosed per-call price for pro_verify (Opus, premium synthesis)

environmentVariables.name: VERITY_PRICE_SUITE
environmentVariables.description: Disclosed per-call price for the suite checks (detect_injection/moderate_content/redact_pii/guard_action, /quick tier)
